summary.text: The dominant pattern today is sustained high attention on MCP / Tool Calling and AI Agent Framework categories, with three projects in each category showing strong daily star growth. 'open-notebook', an open-source alternative to Google Notebook LM, saw the highest single-day delta at 1,119 stars, indicating strong developer interest in self-hosted AI research tools. 'Agent-Reach' and 'last30days-skill' continue to attract attention for enabling AI agents to access real-time web data without API fees. The cross-source signal is weak, with only one project appearing on both GitHub and Hacker News, suggesting that attention is primarily concentrated within the GitHub ecosystem today. The sustained momentum in MCP and agent frameworks suggests developers are prioritizing practical tooling for agentic workflows over foundational model releases.

projects.name: Agent-Reach
projects.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A zero-API-fee CLI that gives AI agents eyes to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — install once, use everywhere.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw) can't natively access most web platforms due to paywalls, login requirements, or anti-bot measures. Agent Reach bundles free, open-source CLI tools for each platform, auto-configures them, and teaches the agent how to use them via a SKILL.md file — so the agent can search Twitter, read Reddit, extract YouTube transcripts, etc., without any API fees or manual setup.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 21,962 stars and a 24-hour delta of +697, this project is sustaining explosive growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), meaning the growth is steady rather than a sudden spike — but the absolute numbers are massive. It's clearly filling a real pain point for AI developers who want their agents to browse the web without paying for APIs or writing custom scrapers.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README is comprehensive and frequently updated (last push 2026-05-18), and the project has been gaining stars steadily. The recent addition of platforms like Douyin, LinkedIn, and WeChat public accounts may have contributed to continued interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a universal pain point for AI agent users: giving agents internet access without API fees. The 'one CLI, zero API fees' pitch is extremely compelling, and the project is well-documented with clear installation instructions. The fact that it works with all major AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf) makes it broadly applicable.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you use AI coding agents, install this. It will save you hours of configuring individual scrapers and API keys. The architecture is modular — each platform is a separate channel file, so you can swap out tools if you prefer alternatives.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' — tooling that makes AI agents self-sufficient on the web. The MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration is a key enabler, and the project's success shows that developers want their agents to be able to browse, search, and extract information from any platform without manual intervention.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI developers and power users who use coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf) and want their agents to be able to read Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and other platforms without paying for APIs or writing custom scrapers.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Relies on third-party CLI tools that may break if platforms change their APIs or anti-bot measures. Cookie-based authentication (for Twitter, Xiaohongshu, etc.) carries account ban risk — the README recommends using throwaway accounts. Some tools (like rdt-cli for Reddit) are relatively new with few stars (304), so long-term maintenance is uncertain.

projects.name: last30days-skill
projects.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

llmSummary.oneLiner: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web, then synthesizes a grounded summary.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Traditional search engines and individual AI models are walled off from each other—Google doesn't index Reddit comments or X posts, ChatGPT has Reddit but not X, Gemini has YouTube but not Reddit. This skill bridges a dozen disconnected platforms into one parallel search, scoring results by real engagement (upvotes, likes, money) rather than SEO.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 28,083 stars, 2,386 forks, and a 24-hour delta of +814 stars, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent v3 release and active commits (within 7 days) keep the momentum fresh.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The v3 pipeline introduced shareable HTML briefs, intelligent pre-research (entity resolution), cross-source cluster merging, single-pass comparisons, and auto-discovered competitor comparisons. These features significantly improved the depth and speed of research, likely driving the sustained interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a real pain point for developers and knowledge workers who need to quickly synthesize information from multiple social platforms and prediction markets—something no single tool does natively. The zero-config setup and broad host support (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, etc.) lower the barrier to adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a practical, production-ready agent skill that demonstrates how to orchestrate multiple APIs and LLM calls into a coherent research workflow. It's a strong reference for building multi-source AI agents.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift toward agent-based research that bypasses traditional search engines. For AI developers, it shows the value of bridging walled-garden platforms and using engagement signals (upvotes, likes, market odds) as ranking signals. The modular skill architecture (via Agent Skills) is a pattern worth adopting.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers, researchers, product managers, sales professionals, and anyone who needs to quickly understand what's happening on social media and the web about a person, company, or topic.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party APIs (Reddit, X, YouTube, etc.) that may change terms or require authentication. The README mentions bringing your own keys and browser sessions, which adds setup friction. The 96 open issues suggest active maintenance but also potential bugs or feature requests.

projects.name: mempalace
projects.description: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Local-first AI memory system with verbatim storage, pluggable backends, and 96.6% R@5 on LongMemEval — no API calls required.
llmSummary.problemSolved: LLMs lack persistent, structured memory across sessions. MemPalace stores conversation history verbatim with semantic search, scoped by wings (people/projects) and rooms (topics), and retrieves it without summarization or cloud dependencies.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 54,075 stars and a 24-hour delta of +443, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1.0), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. It has a recent release and commits within 7 days, showing active maintenance. The rule-based score of 61 and 'sustained_hot' trend type confirm it's a consistently popular tool in the AI memory space.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The recent release and continuous commits suggest ongoing improvements, but no external buzz or sudden acceleration event is detected.
llmSummary.whyTrending: MemPalace addresses a critical pain point for AI developers: persistent memory for LLMs. Its benchmark-leading performance (96.6% raw recall), local-first privacy, and MCP integration make it a practical choice for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and other tools. The pluggable backend design and free MIT license lower adoption barriers.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: MemPalace offers a production-ready, benchmark-validated memory layer that can be integrated via CLI, MCP server, or Python API. It's ideal for developers building AI agents or chat applications that need long-term context without cloud costs.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward local-first, privacy-preserving AI infrastructure. Developers can now add persistent memory to their LLM workflows without vendor lock-in, using a system that outperforms cloud alternatives on retrieval recall.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI developers building agents, chatbots, or coding assistants (e.g., Claude Code users); teams needing structured memory for LLM sessions; researchers evaluating retrieval systems.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The README warns about impostor sites distributing malware. The project relies on ChromaDB by default, which may have scaling limits. External backends (Qdrant, pgvector) require opt-in and expose data to network services. The 569 open issues suggest active community but also potential bugs or feature requests.

llmSummary.whyTrending: CopilotKit is trending because it offers a practical, multi-platform solution for agentic UI, backed by a protocol (AG-UI) adopted by major players like Google, LangChain, and AWS. hotProjects.name: Agent-Reach
hotProjects.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A zero-API-fee CLI that gives AI agents eyes to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — install once, use everywhere.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw) can't natively access most web platforms due to paywalls, login requirements, or anti-bot measures. Agent Reach bundles free, open-source CLI tools for each platform, auto-configures them, and teaches the agent how to use them via a SKILL.md file — so the agent can search Twitter, read Reddit, extract YouTube transcripts, etc., without any API fees or manual setup.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 21,962 stars and a 24-hour delta of +697, this project is sustaining explosive growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), meaning the growth is steady rather than a sudden spike — but the absolute numbers are massive. It's clearly filling a real pain point for AI developers who want their agents to browse the web without paying for APIs or writing custom scrapers.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README is comprehensive and frequently updated (last push 2026-05-18), and the project has been gaining stars steadily. The recent addition of platforms like Douyin, LinkedIn, and WeChat public accounts may have contributed to continued interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a universal pain point for AI agent users: giving agents internet access without API fees. The 'one CLI, zero API fees' pitch is extremely compelling, and the project is well-documented with clear installation instructions. The fact that it works with all major AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf) makes it broadly applicable.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you use AI coding agents, install this. It will save you hours of configuring individual scrapers and API keys. The architecture is modular — each platform is a separate channel file, so you can swap out tools if you prefer alternatives.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' — tooling that makes AI agents self-sufficient on the web. The MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration is a key enabler, and the project's success shows that developers want their agents to be able to browse, search, and extract information from any platform without manual intervention.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI developers and power users who use coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf) and want their agents to be able to read Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and other platforms without paying for APIs or writing custom scrapers.

Cookie-based authentication (for Twitter, Xiaohongshu, etc.) carries account ban risk — the README recommends using throwaway accounts. llmSummary.targetUsers: Job seekers in tech (especially AI/ML roles), career changers, and developers who want to automate their job search without sacrificing quality. Also relevant for recruiters and HR professionals looking to understand AI-driven candidate matching.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The system relies on third-party AI APIs (Claude, Gemini) which may change pricing or availability. The 'spray-and-pray' warning is important — users must review AI-generated applications to avoid reputational damage. The project's rapid growth may attract low-quality forks or misuse.

aihotHighlights.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
aihotHighlights.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

aihotHighlights.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
aihotHighlights.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

aihotHighlights.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
aihotHighlights.summary: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

items.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
items.description: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

items.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
items.description: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.description: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

items.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
items.description: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

items.description: 微软Azure CTO Mark Russinovich在Build 2026上介绍Project Mosaic，这是微软剑桥研究院的实验性光学互连技术，采用micro-LED实现低功耗、高速数据传输。高级研究员Kaoutar Benyahya现场演示单个LED调制形成字母，证明概念具备实时响应能力。

Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
items.description: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

items.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
items.description: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.description: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

trendEntities.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
normalizedKeys: title:persona atlas hugging face 上的开源人物思维映射工具

items.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
items.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

items.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
items.summary: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

items.title: SpaceX与Google达成云计算新协议
items.summary: SpaceX 刚刚披露了一份与 Google 的新云服务协议。 Google 将每月向 SpaceX 支付 9.2 亿美元（约合每年 110 亿美元），用于 xAI 数据中心的计算能力。 这再次表明，AI 算力正成为一种战略性商品，就像发射能力或能源一样，而那些能够为庞大的 GPU 集群提供资金、电力、冷却和运营的公司，可能会在其原有业务之外获得巨大的杠杆优势。

trendEntities.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
normalizedKeys: title:谷歌推出基于 gemini enterprise agent platform 的 agentic rag 框架

items.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
items.summary: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

items.title: 微软Project Mosaic：micro-LED光学互连技术
items.summary: 微软Azure CTO Mark Russinovich在Build 2026上介绍Project Mosaic，这是微软剑桥研究院的实验性光学互连技术，采用micro-LED实现低功耗、高速数据传输。高级研究员Kaoutar Benyahya现场演示单个LED调制形成字母，证明概念具备实时响应能力。

items.title: Anthropic：让Claude成为化学家
items.summary: Anthropic与顶尖化学家合作，提升Claude在化学领域的实用性。首个白皮书测试Claude在NMR谱图分析上的表现：在20个化合物上，对比Claude Opus 4.7、Opus 4.6、Sonnet 4.6与ChemDraw、MestReNova的正向预测（从结构预测谱图）和反向结构解析（从实验谱图推断结构）能力。所有化合物选自模型训练截止日期后发布的ChemRxiv预印本，以避免选择偏差。

items.title: 五角大楼正运营着一个针对拉丁美洲的人工智能宣传机器
items.summary: 据 The Intercept 6月5日报道，美国五角大楼正在运营一个针对拉丁美洲的人工智能宣传机器（AI propaganda mill）。报道指出，该机器利用 AI 技术生成并传播宣传内容，目标为拉丁美洲地区。该消息在 Hacker News 上获得 100 点热度。

trendEntities.title: Google Colab CLI 发布

items.title: Google Colab CLI 发布
items.summary: Google 推出 Colab 命令行界面（CLI），允许开发者和 AI 智能体将本地终端连接到远程 Colab 运行时，实现无摩擦执行。该轻量级 CLI 支持请求高性能 GPU、远程运行本地 Python 脚本，并检索工件日志或模型（如微调后的 Gemma 3 适配器）。工具可直接集成到标准终端环境，可被 Antigravity、Claude Code 等 AI 智能体调用以管理复杂机器学习流水线。

items.title: Google AI 本周产品更新：Nano Banana 2、Co-Scientist、dreambeans、Gemma 4 等
items.summary: Google AI 本周发布多项更新：Nano Banana 2 及 Pro 正式 GA，可通过 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 获取；Co-Scientist 多智能体系统面向科研自动生成优化新假设；Google Labs 推出 dreambeans，根据用户 Google 应用数据每日生成个性化话题集；Gemma 4 12B 统一无编码器多模态模型可完全离线运行于笔记本；Gemma 4 系列及草稿模型引入 QAT 降低内存需求；Google Magenta RealTime 2 开源实时音乐模型，支持 MIDI 键盘、文本提示和手势演奏。

trendEntities.title: Suno Voices 使用指南：6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制
normalizedKeys: title:suno voices 使用指南 6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制

items.title: Suno Voices 使用指南：6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制
items.summary: Suno Voices 面向 Web 付费用户开放。提升人声质量的 6 个技巧：在安静环境录音以减少背景噪音；先练习歌词再正式录制；不必追求完美，保留真实情感；录音时长尽量超过 1 分钟以提供更多学习素材；将人声匹配到合适的音乐流派（如民谣、流行、死亡金属、波萨诺瓦等）；敢于尝试不同风格以发现惊喜。这些技巧旨在帮助用户获得更个性化、表现力更强的声音效果。

trendEntities.title: Hinton称AI拥有意识：人类最好接受非唯一智能生命
normalizedKeys: title:hinton称ai拥有意识 人类最好接受非唯一智能生命

items.title: Hinton称AI拥有意识：人类最好接受非唯一智能生命
items.summary: AI先驱Geoffrey Hinton表示，他认为AI拥有意识，人类应接受自己并非唯一智能生命。他指出AI"非常像我们"，AI聊天机器人必须理解问题才能作答，这种觉知等同于感知能力，智能不限于生物。主推文作者进一步讨论意识本质：笛卡尔的"我思故我在"和fMRI等实证手段都无法真正定义意识，人类对自身了解远不及想象。作者呼吁转向新哲学问题，厘清人与机器的区别与联系。

items.summary: 这是一则AI提示词，让AI扮演极度严格的老师，通过逐阶段教学、持续维护MD检查清单来确保用户真正理解。AI先让用户复述当前理解，再填补漏洞，并用开放式或选择题（随机选项顺序，提交前不公布答案）测试。教学必须覆盖问题本身、解决方案、宏观背景三个层面，并不断深挖"为什么"。仅当用户通过清单上所有项目的验证，会话才算结束。提示词强调对理解程度的主动验证，而非一次性灌输。

items.title: 苹果新版 Siri 不会被宣传为完成品，内部将其标记为"Beta"版
items.summary: 苹果新版Siri被内部标记为"Beta"版，不会作为完成品宣传；可能设置等待清单供用户尝试。iOS 27细节：通知到达重新设计，通知中心手势移至左上角；"查找"应用视觉重设计；照片"清理"功能改进；大量底层安全改进。部分Siri查询将通过Google Cloud调用授权版Gemini，并使用谷歌的NVIDIA Blackwell B200集群处理。

trendEntities.title: Meta 智能眼镜 App 暗藏人脸识别代码，NameTag 功能已推送至超 5000 万设备
normalizedKeys: title:meta 智能眼镜 app 暗藏人脸识别代码 nametag 功能已推送至超 5000 万设备

items.title: Meta 智能眼镜 App 暗藏人脸识别代码，NameTag 功能已推送至超 5000 万设备
items.summary: 据《连线》今日报道，Meta 通过多次应用更新将人脸识别代码推送到智能眼镜配套 App 中，代号"NameTag"。该功能利用已部署的三个 AI 模型将人脸转换为"人脸特征模板"，与手机本地数据库匹配，识别成功后向佩戴者发送通知。App 下载量超 5000 万次。Meta 回应称代码仅为探索，尚未决定推出，且不会建立中央人脸数据库。此前 Meta 曾因人脸识别问题在伊利诺伊州和得克萨斯州分别达成 6.5 亿美元和 14 亿美元和解。

items.title: 开源鸿蒙 OpenHarmony 具身智能版本 EmbodiedAI 1.0.1 发布
items.summary: 6月5日，开源鸿蒙具身智能PMC（筹）发布EmbodiedAI 1.0.1版本。该版本聚焦机器人控制与智能体应用，升级导航规划、运动控制、仿真开发、硬件适配等核心能力，兼容ROS生态、机器人模拟器及多种本体形态。集成开源鸿蒙原生模拟器、MuJoCo、Gazebo三大仿真环境，打通从代码开发到真机验证的全流程链路。人形机器人、四足机器狗、商用服务机器人等已完成适配验证。目前具身智能方向已组建18个专项SIG工作组，版本源码已正式开放。

items.title: 社区基于MiniCPM-V 4.6打造财务分析工具AccountingLLM
items.summary: 社区开发者使用面壁智能MiniCPM-V 4.6构建了AccountingLLM（quaesto.com），用于自动化财务文档分析。该工具可上传IPO招股书、年报或审计文件，自动从复杂PDF中提取财务表格、重建跨页表格、对照会计等式检查关键数据，并标记可疑条目供人工审核。开发者已将其商业化，成为实际可用的产品。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

sourceItems.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
sourceItems.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

items.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
items.summary: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

items.title: Google Colab CLI 发布
items.summary: Google 推出 Colab 命令行界面（CLI），允许开发者和 AI 智能体将本地终端连接到远程 Colab 运行时，实现无摩擦执行。该轻量级 CLI 支持请求高性能 GPU、远程运行本地 Python 脚本，并检索工件日志或模型（如微调后的 Gemma 3 适配器）。工具可直接集成到标准终端环境，可被 Antigravity、Claude Code 等 AI 智能体调用以管理复杂机器学习流水线。

items.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
items.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

items.title: Google AI 本周产品更新：Nano Banana 2、Co-Scientist、dreambeans、Gemma 4 等
items.summary: Google AI 本周发布多项更新：Nano Banana 2 及 Pro 正式 GA，可通过 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 获取；Co-Scientist 多智能体系统面向科研自动生成优化新假设；Google Labs 推出 dreambeans，根据用户 Google 应用数据每日生成个性化话题集；Gemma 4 12B 统一无编码器多模态模型可完全离线运行于笔记本；Gemma 4 系列及草稿模型引入 QAT 降低内存需求；Google Magenta RealTime 2 开源实时音乐模型，支持 MIDI 键盘、文本提示和手势演奏。
